global.description: The ad features a combination of text and abstract graphic elements centered around a financial tracking service.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial tracking app with a focus on ease and peace of mind.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple, bold logo with the text 'EarnPath' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main graphic area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center featuring abstract shapes, suggesting a digital interface or app layout.

elements.label: Secondary graphic area
elements.description: Another rectangular area overlapping with the main graphic, indicating additional content or features.

elements.label: Graphic element
elements.description: An oval shape in the center, representing a user interface element or icon.

elements.label: Additional graphic area
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape that appears to be a content box or feature highlight.

elements.label: Icon element
elements.description: A smaller oval shape that could represent a button or interactive element.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle positioned towards the bottom, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: Another small circle, similar to the previous one, enhancing the design.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Text reading 'Track every euro Built for peace of mind' in a clear, bold font at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Start now' in a contrasting color, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: The word 'EarnPath' displayed prominently at the top, indicating the brand or service.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main graphic areas are centered, and the main message and CTA are at the bottom.
